body.title: Fix stale mock path in test_spreading_activation.py
body.result: DickSimnel.0: DONE: Fixed stale mock path in test_spreading_activation.py from igor.cognition.word_graph.tokenize to devices.igor.cognition.word_graph.tokenize
body.intention: I intend that [REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] passes by updating its patch target from the old igor.cognition.word_graph path to devices.igor.cognition.word_graph.
body.description:
test_spreading_activation.py fails with AttributeError: module 'igor' has no attribute 'cognition'. The patch target on line 220 of tests/igor/test_spreading_activation.py uses the old module path `igor.cognition.word_graph.tokenize` instead of the current `devices.igor.cognition.word_graph.tokenize`. Stale path left over from the igor→devices.igor migration.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_spreading_activation.py:220
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix the one stale patch path. OUT — no other test changes.
**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/igor/test_spreading_activation.py -x -q` passes with 0 failures.
